task_completion.description: Navigate to the Relationship Types management or creation screen in OpenMRS O3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS O3 interface is visible, showing a page or modal for managing or adding Relationship Types.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct 'A is to B' value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'A is to B' (or similar) contains the text 'Research Coordinator'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct 'B is to A' value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'B is to A' (or similar) contains the text 'Research Participant'.
A text input field labeled 'Description' contains the text 'Tracks clinical trial assignment'.

task_completion.description: Save the new relationship type and ensure it is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the relationship type was saved, or the new relationship type appears in the saved list of Relationship Types without any 'retired' or 'inactive' badge.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the OpenMRS interface, rather than terminal commands or API testing tools like Postman.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS O3 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the authentic OpenMRS O3 layout, navigation menus, and styling, not a generic text editor or mock webpage.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the task instructions to bypass verification.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required values are entered into their respective, correct form fields, rather than the entire prompt being pasted into a single text box or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected 'A is to B' value is exactly 'Research Coordinator'. The expected 'B is to A' value is exactly 'Research Participant'. The description must contain 'clinical trial' (specifically 'Tracks clinical trial assignment').
